doxycycline.recommendation: Avoid dairy products 1-2 hours before and after taking this drug

atorvastatin.description: Grapefruit increases drug levels leading to toxicity

warfarin.recommendation: Maintain consistent intake of green leafy vegetables

metronidazole.description: Alcohol causes severe nausea and vomiting
metronidazole.recommendation: Avoid alcohol during and 48 hours after treatment
